title: CoPaw Skill SKILL.md Frontmatter Schema
description: Required frontmatter fields for a valid CoPaw skill SKILL.md

trigger.description: Natural language description of when to use this skill

tools.description: List of tool names this skill provides or requires

required_by.description: Optional: task required_skills values that map to this skill

examples.name: xlsx
examples.trigger: Use when user wants to read, edit, or create spreadsheet files (.xlsx, .csv)
